headline: Exelon Expands 2c2i Portfolio with New Investments in Natrion and Blackcurrant AI
summary: CHICAGO, May 21, 2026--The Exelon Foundation has added two new companies to the Climate Change Investment Initiative (2c2i) portfolio—Blackcurrant AI and Natrion—each tackling different, but critical, energy innovations and positioned to scale as demand for more efficient, lower-cost energy solutions grows.
